Théodore Cherrière, Ph.D.

email GitHub ORCID HAL Scholar

Address

Johann Radon Institute for Computational and Applied Mathematics (RICAM)
Austrian Academy of Sciences
Altenberger Straße 69
4040 Linz, Austria
Room 405
theodore.cherriere [at] ricam.oeaw.ac.at

Short CV

  • 2023–2024 Post-doc @RICAM
  • 2020–2023 Ph.D. @ SATIE, Université Paris-Saclay
  • 2019 Agrégation, electrical engineering (rank 1st)
  • 2016–2020 B.Sc. and M.Sc, electrical engineering @ ENS Paris-Saclay

Research interests

  • Topology optimization of electromagnetic devices
  • Multiphysics modeling
  • Magnetic hysteresis

Teaching

Lectures

  • Implementation of a finite element code

Lab works

  • Bergeron’s method in a transmission line
  • Magnetic property

Tutorials

  • Topology optimization of an electrical transformer, with T. Gauthey

Exercise books

  • [2] Informatique tronc commun - ITC - PSI, MP, PC. S. Janny, W. Shu-Quartier-Dit-Maire, T. Cherrière, J. Redaud. (2022)
  • [1] Oraux corrigés et commentés : Physique-chimie PSI-PSI* Concours X, ENS, CentraleSupélec, Mines-Ponts, CCINP. T. Cherrière, A. Daby-Seesaram, S. Janny, J. Redaud. (2020)

Events organization

  • Workshop on topology optimization of electrical machines. Speakers: T. Gauthey, P. Gangl, E. Kuci.
